Class Controller

java.lang.Object
whistapp.application.Controller
public class Controller extends Object
The controller; acts as a thin communication layer between the UI layer and DOMAIN layer

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Controller()
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    biddingStabilised()
    A function that parses the round bidtype, when everyone has picked a bid.
    boolean
    bidRequiresTrumpDeclaration(String chosenBid)
    A getter that returns true if the given bid name equates to a bid that requires a trump to be declared at bid time.
    boolean
    evaluateAndAdvanceTrick()
    Advances the current round to the next trick.
    void
    exit()
    Exit the application.
    int
    getActivePlayerIndex()
    A getter for the index of the player whose turn it currently is.
    String
    getActivePlayerName()
    A getter for the currently active players name.
    String[]
    getAllowedCardsForCurrentPlayer()
    Returns the allowed card names for the current active player.
    static String[]
    getBidTypes()
    A simple getter returning all bids a player can make.
    BotDifficulty[]
    getBotDifficultyOptions()
    Gets the possible bot difficulties.
    String[]
    getCards()
    Gets the cards of the currently active player.
    String[]
    getCards(String playerName)
    Gets the cards of the currently active player.
    HashMap<String,String>
    getCurrentTrickCardsAsStrings()
    A method reporting the played cards in the active trick.
    String
    getCurrentTrickWinnerName()
    A getter for the name of the winner of the current trick.
    String
    getDealerName()
    A getter for the name of the active dealer.
    String
    getExistingBids()
    Returns a string showing every active bid in this round.
    String[]
    getFinalBidDeclarers()
    Return the active round bids declarers.
    String
    getFinalBidName()
    Returns the active chosen bids name.
    HashMap<String,Integer>
    getGameScoresPerPlayer()
    Gets the results of the entire game, namely the amount of points for every player.
    String
    getLastDealtCard()
    A getter for the last dealt card this round (which is always dealt face up).
    String
    getLastTrickString()
    A function that retrieves a string showing the last played trick
    String
    getLoneProposerName()
    Returns the string of the name of the lone proposer.
    HashMap<String,String[]>
    getOpenMiserieHands()
    Gets the hands of the open miserie players.
    String
    getOriginalTrumpSuitName()
    Returns the original (deck-dealt) trump suit name, equal to the suit of the last dealt card.
    static int
    getPlayerCount()
    A simple getter for the player count of a game
    ArrayList<String>
    getPlayerNames()
    A simple getter for player names
    String[]
    getPossibleBids()
    Return the available bids that can still be played.
    HashMap<String,Integer>
    getRoundScoresPerPlayer()
    Gets the results of a round, only implemented for PlayGameCLI
    Suit[]
    getSuits()
    A simple getter that returns all suits.
    int
    getTricksLeft()
    A simple getter for the amount of tricks left in a round
    String
    getTrumpSuitName()
    Returns the name of the trump suit for the current round.
    boolean
    isAutonomous(int playerIndex)
    Determines if the player at the given index is autonomous (a bot).
    void
    nextRound()
    Starts the next round
    void
    proceedAutonomousBid()
    Commands the game to proceed with an autonomous bid.
    void
    proceedAutonomousCardPlay()
    Commands the game to proceed with an autonomous card play.
    void
    registerBid(String bid)
    Registers a bid as the current player and advances to the next player.
    void
    registerBid(String bid, Suit newTrumpSuit)
    Registers a bid with newTrumpSuit as the current player and advances to the next player.
    void
    registerBids(HashMap<String,String> bids)
    A method for processing a certain bid for the players.
    void
    registerLoneProposer(String proposer)
    Processes the lone proposer to play a proposal alone bid.
    void
    registerNbOfTricksWonPerPlayer(HashMap<String,Integer> nbOfTricksWonPerPlayer)
    Registers the number of tricks won per player for every player at once.
    void
    registerPlayCard(String card)
    Called when the active user (tries to) play a card.
    void
    setReshuffledState(boolean reshuffled)
    Registers the reshuffle state during the bidding stage of a round.
    void
    startNewPlayGame(LinkedHashMap<String, BotDifficulty> playerNamesAndBotDifficulties)
    Start a new game of PlayWhist with the given player names and bot difficulties.

    Start a new game of ScoreWhist with the given player names.

    Starts the playing phase of a round

    A getter to determine when the current trick is over.

    Triggers score calculation for the completed round.

    Methods inherited from class Object

  • Constructor Details

    • Controller

      public Controller()

  • Method Details

    • startNewScoreGame

      public void startNewScoreGame(ArrayList<String> playerNames)
      Start a new game of ScoreWhist with the given player names.

    • startNewPlayGame

      public void startNewPlayGame(LinkedHashMap<String, BotDifficulty> playerNamesAndBotDifficulties)
      Start a new game of PlayWhist with the given player names and bot difficulties. The player map contains player name to BotDifficulty (null if human player).

    • getLastTrickString

      public String getLastTrickString()
      A function that retrieves a string showing the last played trick
      Returns:
      the string representing the last played trick

    • exit

      public void exit()
      Exit the application.

    • getBidTypes

      public static String[] getBidTypes()
      A simple getter returning all bids a player can make.
      Returns:
      An array of BidTypes, that can be printed as a string

    • getPlayerNames

      public ArrayList<String> getPlayerNames()
      A simple getter for player names
      Returns:
      The names of every player in the game, as an ArrayList of strings

    • getTricksLeft

      public int getTricksLeft()
      A simple getter for the amount of tricks left in a round

      Equivalent to the amount of rounds left including the current one.

      Returns:
      the amount of tricks left

    • getPlayerCount

      public static int getPlayerCount()
      A simple getter for the player count of a game
      Returns:
      The number of players (including bots) in a game.

    • registerBid

      public void registerBid(String bid)
      Registers a bid as the current player and advances to the next player.
      Parameters:
      bid - the bid to register

    • registerBid

      public void registerBid(String bid, Suit newTrumpSuit)
      Registers a bid with newTrumpSuit as the current player and advances to the next player.
      Parameters:
      bid - the bid to register
      newTrumpSuit - The new trump suit to go along with a bid. null is also allowed if the bid does not require declaring new trump suit at bid time.

    • registerBids

      public void registerBids(HashMap<String,String> bids)
      A method for processing a certain bid for the players. This bid is to be given as a map playerName -> BidType.
      Parameters:
      bids - The submitted bids.

    • setReshuffledState

      public void setReshuffledState(boolean reshuffled)
      Registers the reshuffle state during the bidding stage of a round.

      Will enable double points, as per whist rules.

      Parameters:
      reshuffled - true if there was a reshuffle during the bidding stage, otherwise false

    • registerNbOfTricksWonPerPlayer

      public void registerNbOfTricksWonPerPlayer(HashMap<String,Integer> nbOfTricksWonPerPlayer)
      Registers the number of tricks won per player for every player at once.
      Parameters:
      nbOfTricksWonPerPlayer - A hashmap with keys being player names (as strings) and values the amount of tricks that player won

    • nextRound

      public void nextRound()
      Starts the next round

      Might reset some state regarding the round, depends on the type of game.

    • biddingStabilised

      public boolean biddingStabilised()
      A function that parses the round bidtype, when everyone has picked a bid.
      Returns:
      true if bidding has stabilized and at least one person has picked a bid. false if everone passed and there was a reshuffle.

    • startPlayingRound

      public void startPlayingRound()
      Starts the playing phase of a round

    • getFinalBidName

      public String getFinalBidName()
      Returns the active chosen bids name.
      Returns:
      The name of the final round bid.

    • getFinalBidDeclarers

      public String[] getFinalBidDeclarers()
      Return the active round bids declarers.
      Returns:
      The names of the players declaring the rounds bid.

    • getPossibleBids

      public String[] getPossibleBids()
      Return the available bids that can still be played.
      Returns:
      The available bids that can still be played.

    • getDealerName

      public String getDealerName()
      A getter for the name of the active dealer.
      Returns:
      the name of the active dealer.

    • getActivePlayerIndex

      public int getActivePlayerIndex()
      A getter for the index of the player whose turn it currently is.
      Returns:
      the index of the player whose turn it currently is.

    • trickIsOver

      public boolean trickIsOver()
      A getter to determine when the current trick is over.
      Returns:
      true if all cards have been played, false otherwise.

    • evaluateAndAdvanceTrick

      public boolean evaluateAndAdvanceTrick()
      Advances the current round to the next trick.
      Returns:
      true if this was the final trick, and we could not advance to the next trick, false otherwise.

    • updateScores

      public void updateScores()
      Triggers score calculation for the completed round. Must be called after all tricks are played, before showing scores. Should not be used when all tricks of a round are registered at once (e.g. ScoreGame).

    • registerPlayCard

      public void registerPlayCard(String card)
      Called when the active user (tries to) play a card.
      Parameters:
      card - The played card, as a string.

    • getCards

      public String[] getCards()
      Gets the cards of the currently active player.
      Returns:
      An array containing the string representations of every card in the active players hand.

    • getCards

      public String[] getCards(String playerName)
      Gets the cards of the currently active player.
      Returns:
      An array containing the string representations of every card in the active players hand.

    • getOpenMiserieHands

      public HashMap<String,String[]> getOpenMiserieHands()
      Gets the hands of the open miserie players.
      Returns:
      A map of player names and their hands.

    • getBotDifficultyOptions

      public BotDifficulty[] getBotDifficultyOptions()
      Gets the possible bot difficulties.
      Returns:
      An array containing all possible difficulties.

    • isAutonomous

      public boolean isAutonomous(int playerIndex)
      Determines if the player at the given index is autonomous (a bot).
      Returns:
      true if the player at the given index is a bot, false otherwise.

    • proceedAutonomousBid

      public void proceedAutonomousBid()
      Commands the game to proceed with an autonomous bid.

    • proceedAutonomousCardPlay

      public void proceedAutonomousCardPlay()
      Commands the game to proceed with an autonomous card play.

    • getGameScoresPerPlayer

      public HashMap<String,Integer> getGameScoresPerPlayer()
      Gets the results of the entire game, namely the amount of points for every player.
      Returns:
      A hashmap with keys equal to the names of every player as a string, and values the amount of points that player scored this game.

    • getRoundScoresPerPlayer

      public HashMap<String,Integer> getRoundScoresPerPlayer()
      Gets the results of a round, only implemented for PlayGameCLI
      Returns:
      A hashmap with keys equal to the names of every player as a string, and values the amount of points that player scored this round.

    • getCurrentTrickCardsAsStrings

      public HashMap<String,String> getCurrentTrickCardsAsStrings()
      A method reporting the played cards in the active trick.
      Returns:
      A hashmap with keys equal to the names of every player as a string, and values equal to the card they played this trick as a string.

    • getAllowedCardsForCurrentPlayer

      public String[] getAllowedCardsForCurrentPlayer()
      Returns the allowed card names for the current active player.
      Returns:
      An array containing the card names of the cards the active player is allowed to play.

    • getTrumpSuitName

      public String getTrumpSuitName()
      Returns the name of the trump suit for the current round.
      Returns:
      The name of the trump suit.

    • getOriginalTrumpSuitName

      public String getOriginalTrumpSuitName()
      Returns the original (deck-dealt) trump suit name, equal to the suit of the last dealt card.
      Returns:
      The name of the original trump suit.

    • getCurrentTrickWinnerName

      public String getCurrentTrickWinnerName()
      A getter for the name of the winner of the current trick.
      Returns:
      The name of the winner of the current trick

    • getActivePlayerName

      public String getActivePlayerName()
      A getter for the currently active players name.
      Returns:
      The name of the currently active player.

    • getLastDealtCard

      public String getLastDealtCard()
      A getter for the last dealt card this round (which is always dealt face up).
      Returns:
      the name of the last dealt card.

    • bidRequiresTrumpDeclaration

      public boolean bidRequiresTrumpDeclaration(String chosenBid)
      A getter that returns true if the given bid name equates to a bid that requires a trump to be declared at bid time.
      Parameters:
      chosenBid - The bid name
      Returns:
      true if the bid requires a trump to be declared at bid time, false otherwise.

    • getSuits

      public Suit[] getSuits()
      A simple getter that returns all suits.
      Returns:
      An array containing all suits.

    • getExistingBids

      public String getExistingBids()
      Returns a string showing every active bid in this round.
      Returns:
      The string of the active bids.

    • getLoneProposerName

      public String getLoneProposerName()
      Returns the string of the name of the lone proposer.
      Returns:
      the name

    • registerLoneProposer

      public void registerLoneProposer(String proposer)
      Processes the lone proposer to play a proposal alone bid.
      Parameters:
      proposer - The proposer to register.
